introSection: Log Roll'r Coaster is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster currently located at Yellowstone Bear World in Rexburg, Idaho, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has an figure-8 layout, and the shape of the train is tree-shaped.

fullText:
Log Roll'r Coaster is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster currently located at Yellowstone Bear World in Rexburg, Idaho, USA.

The ride has an figure-8 layout, and the shape of the train is tree-shaped.

Yellow track and black supports.
